description: You are a storage administrator who keeps daily snapshots of disk-usage read-outs under /home/user/backup/. Two files already exist: 1. /home/user/backup/disk_usage_report_old.txt 2. /home/user/backup/disk_usage_report_new.txt For auditing purposes you must archive a *unified* diff of the two reports in /home/user/updates/. Use the **standard unified diff format** produced by diff -u. To make the output repeatable, the first header line must read exactly --- disk_usage_report_old.txt and the second header line must read exactly +++ disk_usage_report_new.txt (no timestamps, just the two literal strings shown above). Save the resulting diff to /home/user/updates/disk_usage_update.diff The automated checker will confirm that that file: • exists, • is a unified diff, and • contains exactly the nine lines listed below (each terminated by a single newline character, and with leading “–”, “+”, or space prefixes preserved): 1. --- disk_usage_report_old.txt 2. +++ disk_usage_report_new.txt 3. @@ -1,4 +1,4 @@ 4. Filesystem Size Used Avail Use% Mounted on 5. -/dev/sda1 40G 30G 8G 79% / 6. -/dev/sdb1 100G 60G 35G 65% /data 7. +/dev/sda1 40G 28G 10G 72% / 8. +/dev/sdb1 100G 55G 40G 60% /data 9. tmpfs 2.0G 0 2.0G 0% /dev/shm Hint: one correctly-formed diff command, redirecting its output to the target file, is all that is needed.
truth:
Initial files present before the task starts:

1. File: /home/user/backup/disk_usage_report_old.txt  
   Contents (each line terminated with a single newline):
   • Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on  
   • /dev/sda1       40G   30G  8G   79% /  
   • /dev/sdb1       100G  60G  35G  65% /data  
   • tmpfs           2.0G  0    2.0G  0% /dev/shm

2. File: /home/user/backup/disk_usage_report_new.txt  
   Contents:  
   • Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on  
   • /dev/sda1       40G   28G  10G  72% /  
   • /dev/sdb1       100G  55G  40G  60% /data  
   • tmpfs           2.0G  0    2.0G  0% /dev/shm

Directory /home/user/updates/ exists and is writable (0700).

Expected artefact after the agent completes:

File: /home/user/updates/disk_usage_update.diff  
Exact content (including prefixes, spaces and trailing newlines):

--- disk_usage_report_old.txt\n
+++ disk_usage_report_new.txt\n
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@\n
 Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on\n
-/dev/sda1       40G   30G  8G   79% /\n
-/dev/sdb1       100G  60G  35G  65% /data\n
+/dev/sda1       40G   28G  10G  72% /\n
+/dev/sdb1       100G  55G  40G  60% /data\n
 tmpfs           2.0G  0    2.0G  0% /dev/shm\n

(That is nine lines, each ending with “\n”.)
